chapter_title.en: What Defiles Clothing and the Body

text: 169 - وَ سَأَلَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَخَاهُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ وَقَعَ ثَوْبُهُ عَلَى كَلْبٍ مَيْتٍ قَالَ «يَنْضِحُهُ وَ يُصَلِّي فِيهِ وَ لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.169 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about a man whose clothing comes into contact with a dead dog.
Imam (as) replied: 'He should sprinkle it with water and may pray in it, and there is no issue.'.
